headline: KL Sinkhole Incidents Triple in 5 Years to 85
context: DBKL recorded 85 sinkhole incidents in 2025 triple the 28 in 2020 linked to aging underground utilities and limestone geology.

cards.big: KL sinkholes tripled from 28 in 2020 to 85 in 2025
cards.sub: Aging water pipes and limestone geology create dangerous ground instability

cards.big: August 2025 Jalan Masjid India sinkhole swallowed pedestrian in viral incident
cards.sub: Rescue lasted 8 days involving RM12 million in emergency response costs

cards.big: 72% of sinkholes occur above water pipes dating from 1970s or earlier
cards.sub: Persistent leaks erode limestone creating voids up to 15 metres deep

cards.big: Underground utility mapping covers only 35% of KL subsurface infrastructure
cards.sub: Complete mapping would cost RM280 million but could prevent most incidents

cards.big: Sinkholes test whether underground infrastructure gets attention before catastrophic failure
KL sinkholes tripled in 5 years to 85 incidents. Underground utility mapping would prevent most of them.
